notes: Built on v4.3.157 visible bolete rights cleanup package.
Normalized Commons image metadata for visible oddball and peppery bolete records using exact file-page verification.

Recovered verified images for Aureoboletus roxanae, Boletellus chrysenteroides, Boletellus pseudochrysenteroides, Buchwaldoboletus sphaerocephalus, Paragyrodon sphaerosporus, and Pulveroboletus ravenelii.
Dropped unresolved Boletellus pseudochrysenteroides 776874 and cleared unresolved Chalciporus rubinellus images pending exact rights verification.
Changed specialist ID/comparison records away from normal food-role framing where current wording was not food-forward.
